content: samber/lo v1.53.0 (Mar 2026, 21.4k stars) is the dominant Go utility library. Provides Filter, Map, Reduce, Ternary, Coalesce, etc. Heavily used in the Go ecosystem. However, for this project it is NOT recommended because it conflicts with the minimal-dependency philosophy, overlaps with existing flow/ packages, and pulls in 930+ commits. Recommended approach: implement specific helpers as small generics when needed.
